user.title: Connect Gizwits
user.description: Enter your Gizwits-based app account. The integration will fetch your device list automatically.

device.title: Choose device
device.description: Select the Gizwits device to add.

error.device_not_found: Could not find the specified device
error.multiple_devices: More than one device matched; use the did instead
error.no_devices: No devices were found for this account
